If Mars begins his retrograde motion while passing through
the 10th, 11th or the I2th star reckoned from the one wherein he
rises after eclipse, it is called Asrumukka or Tear-Face. Consequently,
he will spoil all juices or tastes, and cause diseases and drought at
his next emergence from combustion.

70 Brhat Samhitu
If the retrogression referred to above starts when Mars moves
through the 13th or 14th star, it is known as Vynla-Vaktra or Snake-
Mouth. It will fructify when Mars gets eclipsed next time. Cons-
quently, people will he troubled by snakes (or tusked animals),
wild elephants and beasts, but they will enjoy prosperity or abun-
dant food.
